calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Rowena Navia, Esq., for Dorothy Lee, Administrator.

At the onset, the court and counsel discuss why the court should not require the Administrator to comply with FDIC limits to fully insure the estate cash on hand despite the waivers of compliance. Counsel offers advocacy for the preceding and for the request for both extraordinary and ordinary fees.

At conclusion of discussion, the court advises that it is prepared to waive compliance with the FDIC limit and the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Park. Not Reported.

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Rowena Navia appearing via zoom for Dorthy Lee (Petitioner).

Mrs. Navia stated that the petition is complete and will file at the end of the week. Status on close of estate is continued to September 05, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Svahlin: Not reported.
